==================
Template directives
==================

{% extends "layouts/base.peb" %}
{% import "macros/forms.peb" as forms %}
{% block content %}
  <section class="user-card">
    <h1>{{ user.name | title }}</h1>
    {% if user.active and user.roles[0] != "guest" %}
      <p>{{ forms.input("email", user.email) }}</p>
      {% include "partials/details.peb" %}
    {% endif %}
    {# Rendered only for active users #}
  </section>
{% endblock %}

---

(source_file
  (directive
    (tag_name)
    (template_item
      (expression
        (string_literal))))
  (directive
    (tag_name)
    (template_item
      (expression
        (string_literal)))
    (template_item
      (keyword))
    (template_item
      (expression
        (identifier))))
  (directive
    (tag_name)
    (template_item
      (expression
        (identifier))))
  (text)
  (output
    (template_item
      (expression
        (member_expression
          (identifier)
          (identifier))))
    (template_item
      (operator))
    (template_item
      (expression
        (identifier))))
  (text)
  (directive
    (tag_name)
    (template_item
      (expression
        (member_expression
          (identifier)
          (identifier))))
    (template_item
      (keyword))
    (template_item
      (expression
        (subscript_expression
          (member_expression
            (identifier)
            (identifier))
          (template_item
            (expression
              (number_literal))))))
    (template_item
      (operator))
    (template_item
      (expression
        (string_literal))))
  (text)
  (output
    (template_item
      (expression
        (call_expression
          (member_expression
            (identifier)
            (identifier))
          (template_item
            (expression
              (string_literal)))
          (template_item)
          (template_item
            (expression
              (member_expression
                (identifier)
                (identifier))))))))
  (text)
  (directive
    (tag_name)
    (template_item
      (expression
        (string_literal))))
  (directive
    (tag_name))
  (comment)
  (text)
  (directive
    (tag_name))
  (text))
